zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle De Lorraine於1410年3月20日出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Charles II de Lorraine45歲，母親Margarethe von der Pfalz34歲。她於1420年10月20日與René d'Anjou在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年2月28日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年42歲，埋葬在法國安喬安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle De Lorraine于1410年3月20日出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，她的父亲Charles II de Lorraine45岁，母亲Margarethe von der Pfalz34岁。她于1420年10月20日与René d'Anjou在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1453年2月28日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年42岁，埋葬在法国安喬安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle De Lorraine was born on 20 March 1410, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Charles II de Lorraine, was 45 and her mother, Margarethe von der Pfalz, was 34. She married René d'Anjou on 20 October 1420, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 28 February 1453, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Angers, Anjou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle De Lorraine est née le 20 mars 1410, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Charles II de Lorraine, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margarethe von der Pfalz, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé René d'Anjou le 20 octobre 1420, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1453, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Angers, Anjou, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle De Lorraine am 20. März 1410 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles II de Lorraine 45 und ihre Mutter Margarethe von der Pfalz 34. Sie hat am 20. Oktober 1420 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich René d'Anjou geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1453 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Anjou, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle De Lorraine è nata il il 20 marzo 1410 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Charles II de Lorraine, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Margarethe von der Pfalz, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato René d'Anjou il 20 ottobre 1420, nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1453, nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Angers, Anjou, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle De Lorraineが1410年3月20日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Charles II de Lorraineは45歳，母Margarethe von der Pfalzは34歳であった。1420年10月20日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシでRené d'Anjouと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年2月28日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで42歳で死去し，フランスアンジョウアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle De Lorraine(이)가 1410년 3월 20일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles II de Lorraine(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarethe von der Pfalz(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1420년 10월 20일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 René d'Anjou(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 2월 28일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 앤조우 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle De Lorraine nasceu em 20 de março de 1410, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Charles II de Lorraine, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margarethe von der Pfalz, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com René d'Anjou em 20 de outubro de 1420, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1453, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Angers, Anjou, França.

ru.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle De Lorraine родилась 20 марта 1410 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Charles II de Lorraine было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarethe von der Pfalz, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени René d'Anjou 20 октября 1420 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 28 февраля 1453 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности ангирс, анджоу, Франция.

es.20 Mar 1410–28 February 1453: 20 de marzo de 1410–28 de febrero de 1453
es.Bourges, Cher, Centre, France: Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia
es.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle De Lorraine nació el 20 de marzo de 1410, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Charles II de Lorraine, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margarethe von der Pfalz, tenía 34 años. Se casó con René d'Anjou el 20 de octubre de 1420, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1453, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Angers, Anjou, Francia.
